title: Wholesome Weeknight Indian Peanut Cookies Curry
description: A steamy, briny, cheese-pull Indian dish featuring peanut cookies, perfect for a busy weeknight and suitable for Jain diets. This comforting meal is served in a bento box, making it a unique and satisfying experience.
instructions: In a small saucepan, heat the coconut milk over medium heat.
Add the garam masala, turmeric, red chili powder, ginger, and garlic, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the lentil soup and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the peanut cookies and stir until they are well coated with the curry sauce.
Add the green chilies and salt, and stir to combine.
Transfer the curry to a serving vessel, garnish with chopped cilantro, and serve hot in a bento box.
To assemble the bento box, place a scoop of the curry on the bottom, followed by a crispy peanut cookie, and finish with a sprinkle of cilantro and a dollop of coconut milk.
